item.title: Breaking the Damn Vulnerable Web App – Step by Step
item.description: Introduction Hey hackers, welcome back to my blog! In this write-up, I’ll walk you through how to hack the Damn Vulnerable Web Application (DVWA). If you haven’t set it up yet, feel free to check out my previous guide on How to Set Up a Metasploitable Lab—it covers everything you need to get DVWA running. DVWA offers three difficulty levels for each vulnerability, and in this post, we’ll explore all of them, one by one.
